LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS JONATHAN CORBETT, TELEVISION EDUCATION, INC.'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE & FOR AN AWARD OF ATTYS' FEES & EXPENSE (YOLO COUNTY) -- THE COURT DID NOT ALLOW OPPOSING COUNSEL TO ARGUE THE MATTER DUE TO INSUFFICIENT COMPLIANCE OF COURT TENTATIVE RULING RULE. ( OPPOSING COUNSEL NOTIFIED THRU MOVING PARTY'S VOICE MAIL ON THE EARLY MORNING OF APRIL 19, 2005 THAT HE WILL BE CONTESTING THE TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT WAS ADVISED BY THE MOVING PARTY PER FAX MESSAGE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT DETERMINED THAT IT'S NOT A SUFFECIENT NOTICE TO CONTEST BASED ON SF LOCAL RULES RE TENTATIVE RULING.) HENCE, THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTAITVE RULING. GRANT THE TRANSFER OF VENUE TO YOLO COUNTY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647
